incorrects.description: Student placed a wrong number tile on first attempt

steps.text: Not quite. Count all the flowers. How many total?

incorrects.description: Student placed a wrong number tile on second attempt

params.description: Groups highlight one at a time: 7, 14, 21, 28.

steps.text: Skip count by 7s: 7, 14, 21, 28. Four groups of 7. What's the total?

incorrects.description: Student placed a wrong number tile three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: Groups highlight one at a time as guide counts: 7, 14, 21, 28.

steps.text: Let me show you. I count the groups: 1, 2, 3, 4 groups. Each group has 7 flowers. Skip count by 7s: 7, 14, 21, 28. Four groups of 7 makes 28 total. The product is 28. That's the same value as 4 times 7.
